title: Debugging
description: Build a reproducible diagnosis loop, rank falsifiable causes, instrument one variable at a time, fix, and prove the original symptom is gone. Use for bugs, broken flows, flaky behavior, and performance regressions.
body: Start by making the symptom observable. Patch from reproduced evidence. A debugging run is valid when it reproduces the user-described symptom, narrows the cause with falsifiable evidence, removes temporary probes, and leaves a regression signal or a handoff naming the evidence seam to inspect next.
